title: Transformers & LLMs: A Beginner's Guide to Large Language Models
description:
Dive into the exciting world of Transformers and Large Language Models (LLMs) in this comprehensive beginner's guide! 🤖🧠

We'll break down complex concepts like attention mechanisms, encoder-decoder architectures, and positional encoding into easy-to-understand explanations. Learn what transformers are, how they work, and how they paved the way for today's powerful LLMs like GPT, BERT, and T5. 🚀

Explore the key components of transformers, understand the training process behind LLMs (pre-training and fine-tuning), and discover the diverse range of LLM architectures that are shaping the future of AI. We'll also discuss the current applications of LLMs in content creation, conversational AI, education, healthcare, and more! ✍️💬📚🏥

Plus, we'll peek into the future and explore exciting directions like multimodal models, enhanced reasoning capabilities, improved efficiency, and the crucial aspects of alignment and safety. ✨ Get ready to unlock the potential of these game-changing technologies! 

#Transformers #LLMs #LargeLanguageModels #AI #ArtificialIntelligence #DeepLearning #MachineLearning #GPT #BERT #T5 #NeuralNetworks #gitworkflow 
Chapters:
00:00 - Transformers & LLMs
00:21 - What are Transformers?
01:01 - Key Components of Transformers
02:05 - Attention Mechanism Explained
02:43 - From Transformers to LLMs
03:39 - What are Large Language Models?
04:22 - How LLMs Work
05:14 - Training LLMs
06:08 - Key LLM Architectures
07:28 - Applications & Future Directions
08:49 - Outro
